properties.name: razorpay.key_secret
properties.description: Razorpay API key secret. Prefer environment variables in production.

properties.name: razorpay.webhook_secret
properties.description: Razorpay webhook signing secret for POST /payments/webhook (PaymentServiceImpl).

properties.name: youdash.outstation.price-per-km
properties.description: Fallback price per km for outstation quotes when vehicle is not selected. Prefer kebab-case in application.properties; camelCase is an accepted alias.

properties.name: youdash.maps.distance.api-key
properties.description: Google Maps / Distance Matrix API key; when empty, haversine is used (DistanceServiceImpl).

properties.name: notification.dedup.ttl-ms
properties.description: Deduplication window for identical notifications in ms (NotificationDedupService).

properties.name: notification.admin.fcm.tokens
properties.description: Comma-separated FCM tokens for admin/ops devices (NotificationService).

properties.name: firebase.service-account.path
properties.description: Filesystem path to Firebase service account JSON; enables FCM when set (FirebaseConfig).
